description_long: This is a large, red semi-truck tractor with a prominent front grille, chrome exhaust stacks, and a sleeper cab configuration. The cab features detailed side mirrors, fuel tanks, and a decorative graphic on the hood. The rear of the truck has dual rear axles, mud flaps, and a visible fifth wheel for trailer attachment. The side profile reveals a robust chassis and aerodynamic fairings, while the rear view displays a graphic on the sleeper cab and the absence of a cargo bed. The truck's exterior is primarily red with metallic silver and black accents, giving it a striking and professional appearance. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty vehicle intended for long-haul freight transport in urban and highway environments.
description: A red semi-truck tractor with a sleeper cab, chrome details, and dual rear axles, designed for hauling trailers. It features bold graphics, metallic accents, and a robust, professional build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, chrome exhaust stacks, and a decorative graphic on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sleeper cab, side mirrors, fuel tanks, and dual rear axles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sleeper cab with a graphic, mud flaps, and the fifth wheel for trailer attachment.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, chassis, and rear axles with clear visibility of the truck's length.
